title: [LESS clinical flexible shifts!] Locum Senior Occupational Therapist (Community Care) @ West [UP $70/h] #HJCT
description:
Salary: Up to $70/h

Office hours

Flexible shifts and days


Job scope:

• Review the suitability of referrals to the Community Care Occupational Therapist within set criteria

• Review and discuss cases which are escalated by nurses, doctors and allied health.

• Screening and referral of potential cases (discharged from Inpatient) to Community Care Team (CCT)

• Conduct home visits, telehealth consults, SOC and Community Health Post (CHP) visits to assess and manage OT related issues.

• Provide individualized OT assessment together with appropriate prescriptions and recommendations to patients and caregivers as required

• Act as resource person on issues regarding occupational therapy for the multidisciplinary team when applicable

• Educate community care healthcare workers on screening for OT related needs (eg. ADLs, cognition) of patients and appropriate interventions, where applicable

• Ad-hoc sharing / case study presentation at CCT’s Journal Club sessions

• Developing and planning new service areas / programmes in community space.

• Involvement in any other administrative duties as required, including capturing workload and NGEMR related matters.


TELE me at @stefanielohwm or WA me at https://wa.me/+6591728493 NOW!

Interested candidates please submit your resume to healthcare12@recruitexpress.com.sg


Jace Choo Oi Kei

Personnel EA License No.: R1875164

Recruit Express Pte Ltd (EA Licence No.: 99C4599)
